retrieved_result: Exterior Foundation Insulation \"Exterior Foundation Insulation If you are excavating to waterproof your foundation, it's also a good time to consider adding some insulation to your foundation. Even if you don't have a finished basement that you and your family use as living space, an uninsulated foundation can account for as much.\"
